gadgets.title: [DUMMY] Habit Streak Tracker
gadgets.description: A minimal daily tracker with a GitHub-style heatmap. Keeps me honest without the bloat of a full productivity app.

gadgets.title: [DUMMY] Meeting Cost Calculator
gadgets.description: Enter attendees and salary bands — see how much that meeting just cost. A gentle nudge toward fewer, better meetings.

gadgets.title: [DUMMY] Decision Randomiser
gadgets.description: Can't pick between options? Spin the wheel. If you feel disappointed by the result, you already know what you actually wanted.

gadgets.title: [DUMMY] Coffee Spend Tracker
gadgets.description: Log your daily coffee purchases and watch the annual total climb. Sometimes you need a reality check, one latte at a time.

gadgets.title: [DUMMY] Pomodoro Focus Timer
gadgets.description: A distraction-free timer with session tracking. Clean, simple, and doesn't try to gamify your entire life.

gadgets.title: [DUMMY] Link Shortener & QR Gen
gadgets.description: Paste a long URL, get a short one and a QR code. Built because I was tired of ad-heavy free tools for something simple.

resources.title: Develop Your Career Like an MBB Consultant
resources.description: A practical checklist for building the professional skills that matter most in your first 1–2 years — with tangible examples of what 'good' looks like.

resources.title: The Language of Impact
resources.description: The exact speech patterns, reframes, and language habits that build credibility and influence — with before/after examples for every situation.

resources.title: [DUMMY] Decision Journal Template
resources.description: Log important decisions with context, alternatives, and expected outcomes. Review later to calibrate your judgment over time.

resources.title: [DUMMY] Weekly Review System
resources.description: My weekly reflection workflow: what went well, what didn't, and what to focus on next. Simple enough to actually stick with.

resources.title: [DUMMY] Moving to a New City Checklist
resources.description: Everything from finding a flat to setting up utilities, transferring registrations, and the small stuff you always forget.

resources.title: [DUMMY] How I Use AI Tools Daily
resources.description: A practical rundown of how I use Claude, GPT, and other AI tools in my workflow — with real examples and prompts that work.

resources.title: [DUMMY] Priority Matrix Worksheet
resources.description: A one-pager for sorting tasks by urgency and impact. Print it, stick it on your desk, and stop doing busy-work first.
